title: Verify existing implementation of clamp utility
description: The clamp(value, min, max) utility already exists at src/utils/clamp.ts with comprehensive tests at src/utils/clamp.test.ts. Tests verify: value within range, below min, above max, edge cases at min/max boundaries, negative numbers, floating point numbers, and throws when min > max. All 8 tests pass.
existing_patterns: src/utils/clamp.ts follows the utility module pattern with single-function file
src/utils/clamp.test.ts uses vitest with describe/it/expect and is co-located with the implementation
